name: Headphones 1U
description: Stereo headphone amplifier and line output. Left input is normalled to right, and version 2 adds a rear 3-pin link for direct audio from compatible Intellijel modules and cases.

controls.name: HEADPHONE Level
controls.description: Sets the listening level for the headphone output.

inputs.name: L Input
inputs.description: Left audio input. Normalled to the right input for mono monitoring.

inputs.name: R Input
inputs.description: Right audio input. Receives the left signal when the right jack is left empty.

inputs.name: 3-Pin Link Connector
inputs.description: Rear-panel input for direct audio from compatible Intellijel modules or cases. Used on version 2 modules.

inputs.name: JP1 Jumper
inputs.description: Rear jumper that normals L to R when the link connector is unused. Remove it when using the rear link.

outputs.name: HEADPHONE Out
outputs.description: Stereo 1/4 inch headphone output. Also works as a stereo line output.

behaviors.name: Mono on left
behaviors.description: A mono source patched to L Input feeds both headphone channels through the internal normal.

behaviors.name: Rear-link monitoring
behaviors.trigger: patch a compatible Intellijel module to the 3-pin link connector
behaviors.description: Version 2 can receive audio directly from a linked module or case without front-panel patch cables.

behaviors.name: Headphones as line out
behaviors.trigger: use the 1/4 inch jack as an output
behaviors.description: The headphone jack doubles as a stereo line output for recording, desk monitoring, or a quick PA feed.

behaviors.name: JP1 link normal
behaviors.description: The JP1 jumper restores the internal left-to-right normal when the rear link is not in use.

patchIdeas.name: Case monitor
patchIdeas.patch: Stereo mixer to L Input and R Input · headphone jack to cans · one 1U module gives a quick private monitor path inside the case.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Headphones 1U:
* HEADPHONE Level: noon

Stereo Mixer 1U:

Output:

- Stereo Mixer 1U (OUT L) -> Headphones 1U (L Input)
- Stereo Mixer 1U (OUT R) -> Headphones 1U (R Input)
- Headphones 1U (HEADPHONE Out) -> Output (Phones)

patchIdeas.name: Mono utility monitor
patchIdeas.patch: Mono synth to L Input only · the internal normal feeds both ears · fast level check without repatching a right channel.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Headphones 1U:
* HEADPHONE Level: low

VCO:
Output:

- VCO (Out) -> Headphones 1U (L Input)
- Headphones 1U (HEADPHONE Out) -> Output (Phones)

patchIdeas.name: Direct line feed
patchIdeas.patch: Use the headphone jack as a stereo line output for a recorder or small mixer · same routing, no case-wide output module required.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Headphones 1U:
* HEADPHONE Level: noon

Mixer:
Recorder:

- Mixer (Out L) -> Headphones 1U (L Input)
- Mixer (Out R) -> Headphones 1U (R Input)
- Headphones 1U (HEADPHONE Out) -> Recorder (In)
